--
-- Table structure for table `project_endorsements`
--

CREATE TABLE `project_endorsements` (
  `id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `user_id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `project_id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `strength` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'standard',
  `comment` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- --------------------------------------------------------

--
-- Table structure for table `reports`
--

CREATE TABLE `reports` (
  `id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `reportable_type` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `reportable_id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `reporter_id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `reason` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `admin_notes` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','resolved','ignored') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- --------------------------------------------------------

--
-- Table structure for table `resumes`
--

CREATE TABLE `resumes` (
  `id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `user_id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `template_id` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ats-clean',
  `data` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin NOT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`data`)),
  `is_public` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `views_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Dumping data for table `resumes`
--

INSERT INTO `resumes` (`id`, `user_id`, `title`, `slug`, `template_id`, `data`, `is_public`, `views_count`, `created_at`, `updated_at`) VALUES
(3, 5, 'Professional Identity', 'e1a3c87b-dfd7-47c8-bae2-a6e8ccdea772', 'latex-classic', '{\"raw_latex\":\"\\\\documentclass[letterpaper,10pt]{article}\\n\\n\\\\usepackage{latexsym}\\n\\\\usepackage[empty]{fullpage}\\n\\\\usepackage{titlesec}\\n\\\\usepackage{enumitem}\\n\\\\usepackage[hidelinks]{hyperref}\\n\\\\usepackage{fancyhdr}\\n\\\\usepackage[english]{babel}\\n\\\\usepackage{tabularx}\\n\\\\usepackage{array}\\n\\\\input{glyphtounicode}\\n\\\\usepackage{fontawesome5}\\n\\\\hypersetup{colorlinks=true, urlcolor=black}\\n\\n\\\\pagestyle{fancy}\\n\\\\fancyhf{}\\n\\\\renewcommand{\\\\headrulewidth}{0pt}\\n\\\\renewcommand{\\\\footrulewidth}{0pt}\\n\\n\\\\addtolength{\\\\oddsidemargin}{-0.6in}\\n\\\\addtolength{\\\\textwidth}{1.2in}\\n\\\\addtolength{\\\\topmargin}{-0.7in}\\n\\\\addtolength{\\\\textheight}{1.4in}\\n\\n\\\\raggedright\\n\\\\raggedbottom\\n\\\\setlength{\\\\parindent}{0pt}\\n\\n\\\\titleformat{\\\\section}{\\n  \\\\vspace{-4pt}\\\\raggedright\\\\large\\\\bfseries\\\\uppercase\\n}{}{0em}{}[\\\\titlerule \\\\vspace{-4pt}]\\n\\n\\\\pdfgentounicode=1\\n\\n\\\\newcommand{\\\\resumeSubheading}[2]{\\n  \\\\begin{tabular*}{0.97\\\\textwidth}{l@{\\\\extracolsep{\\\\fill}}r}\\n    \\\\textbf{#1} & #2 \\\\\\\\\\n  \\\\end{tabular*}\\n}\\n\\n%================ EDIT DETAILS =================\\n\\\\newcommand{\\\\name}{Vanshika Singh}\\n\\\\newcommand{\\\\phone}{8076343451}\\n\\\\newcommand{\\\\email}{vanshikas117@gmail.com}\\n\\n\\\\begin{document}\\n\\n%================ HEADER =================\\n\\\\begin{tabularx}{\\\\linewidth}{X r}\\n\\\\begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}}\\n{\\\\huge \\\\textbf{Vanshika Singh}} \\\\\\\\\\n{\\\\small Bachelor Of Technology (B.Tech)}\\n\\\\end{tabular}\\n&\\n\\\\begin{tabular}{@{}r@{}}\\nNoida, India \\\\\\\\\\n\\\\href{mailto:\\\\email}{\\\\email} \\\\\\\\\\n+91-\\\\phone \\\\\\\\\\n\\\\href{https:\\/\\/linkedin.com\\/in\\/vanshika-singh-162a0522a}{LinkedIn}\\n\\\\end{tabular}\\n\\\\end{tabularx}\\n\\\\vspace{-12pt}\\n\\n%================ SUMMARY =================\\n\\\\section{Professional Summary}\\n\\nCloud Engineer with practical experience in designing and deploying scalable solutions on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). Proficient in building data pipelines, integrating AI capabilities using Gemini, and developing backend services aligned with business needs. Strong understanding of cloud architecture, API development, and workflow automation with a focus on performance, scalability, and reliability.\\n\\n%================ EDUCATION =================\\n\\\\section{Education}\\n\\\\resumeSubheading\\n{Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech)}{AKTU} \\\\\\\\\\n\\n%================ EXPERIENCE =================\\n\\\\section{Professional Experience}\\n\\n\\\\resumeSubheading{Cloud Engineer \\u2014 Tata Consultancy Services}{June 2025 -- Present}\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Developed and maintained cloud-based solutions on Google Cloud Platform (GCP), leveraging tools such as AgentSpace and Gemini AI.\\n  \\\\item Translated business requirements into scalable cloud architectures and automated workflows.\\n  \\\\item Designed and supported data pipelines for structured data processing and reporting.\\n  \\\\item Built and integrated REST APIs to enable seamless data exchange across systems.\\n  \\\\item Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable and efficient technical solutions.\\n  \\\\item Monitored, debugged, and optimized cloud applications to improve system performance and stability.\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ PROJECT =================\\n\\\\section{Project}\\n\\n\\\\resumeSubheading{Brain Tumor Detection \\\\& Classification Using Deep Learning}{Mar 2024 -- May 2024}\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Developed a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model for automated detection and classification of brain tumors from MRI images.\\n  \\\\item Implemented data preprocessing and augmentation techniques to improve dataset quality and model generalization.\\n  \\\\item Achieved over 90\\\\% classification accuracy using TensorFlow and Keras.\\n  \\\\item Optimized model performance through hyperparameter tuning and validation techniques.\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ TRAINING =================\\n\\\\section{Training Experience}\\n\\n\\\\resumeSubheading{Trainee \\u2014 Tata Consultancy Services}{}\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Completed enterprise training in Java, JavaScript, Spring Boot, Angular, JSP, and Servlets.\\n  \\\\item Built full-stack applications with backend services and MySQL database integration.\\n  \\\\item Developed CRUD-based applications simulating real-world business use cases.\\n  \\\\item Gained hands-on experience in REST API development, application architecture, and debugging.\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ SKILLS =================\\n\\\\section{Skills}\\n\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Cloud:} Google Cloud Platform (GCP), AgentSpace, Gemini AI\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Programming:} Java, JavaScript, Python\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Frameworks:} Spring Boot, Angular\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{ML\\/AI:} TensorFlow, Keras, CNN\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Web Technologies:} JSP, Servlets\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Database:} MySQL\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Core Concepts:} Cloud Architecture, Data Pipelines, API Development, Workflow Automation, System Design\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ CERTIFICATIONS =================\\n\\\\section{Certifications}\\n\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt,  \\\\vspace{-4pt}\\\\raggedright\\\\large\\\\bfseries\\\\uppercase\\n}{}{0em}{}[\\\\titlerule \\\\vspace{-4pt}]\\n\\n\\\\pdfgentounicode=1\\n\\n\\\\newcommand{\\\\resumeSubheading}[2]{\\n =================\\n\\\\newcommand{\\\\name}{Vanshika Singh}\\n\\\\newcommand{\\\\phone}{8076343451}\\n\\\\newcommand{\\\\email}{vanshikas117@gmail.com}\\n\\n\\\\begin{document}\\n\\n%================ HEADER =================\\n\\\\begin{tabularx}{\\\\linewidth}{X r}\\n\\\\begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}}\\n{\\\\huge \\\\textbf{Vanshika Singh}} \\\\\\\\\\n{\\\\small Bachelor Of Technology (B.Tech)}\\n\\\\end{tabular}\\n&\\n\\\\begin{tabular}{@{}r@{}}\\nNoida, India \\\\\\\\\\n\\\\href{mailto:\\\\email}{\\\\email} \\\\\\\\\\n+91-\\\\phone \\\\\\\\\\n\\\\href{https:\\/\\/linkedin.com\\/in\\/vanshika-singh-162a0522a}{LinkedIn}\\n\\\\end{tabular}\\n\\\\end{tabularx}\\n\\\\vspace{-12pt}\\n\\n%================ SUMMARY =================\\n\\\\section{Professional Summary}\\n\\nCloud Engineer with practical experience in designing and deploying scalable solutions on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). Proficient in building data pipelines, integrating AI capabilities using Gemini, and developing backend services aligned with business needs. Strong understanding of cloud architecture, API development, and workflow automation with a focus on performance, scalability, and reliability.\\n\\n%================ EDUCATION =================\\n\\\\section{Education}\\n\\\\resumeSubheading\\n{Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) \\u2014 AKTU}{2020 -- 2025} \\\\\\\\\\n\\n%================ EXPERIENCE =================\\n\\\\section{Professional Experience}\\n\\n\\\\resumeSubheading{Cloud Engineer \\u2014 Tata Consultancy Services}{June 2025 -- Present}\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Developed and maintained cloud-based solutions on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and Gemini AI.\\n  \\\\item Translated business requirements into scalable cloud architectures and automated workflows.\\n  \\\\item Designed and supported data pipelines for structured data processing and reporting.\\n  \\\\item Built and integrated REST APIs to enable seamless data exchange across systems.\\n  \\\\item Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable and efficient technical solutions.\\n  \\\\item Monitored, debugged, and optimized cloud applications to improve system performance and stability.\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ PROJECT =================\\n\\\\section{Project}\\n\\n\\\\resumeSubheading{Brain Tumor Detection \\\\& Classification Using Deep Learning}{Mar 2024 -- May 2024}\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Developed a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model for automated detection and classification of brain tumors from MRI images.\\n  \\\\item Implemented data preprocessing and augmentation techniques to improve dataset quality and model generalization.\\n  \\\\item Achieved over 90\\\\% classification accuracy using TensorFlow and Keras.\\n  \\\\item Optimized model performance through hyperparameter tuning and validation techniques.\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ TRAINING =================\\n\\\\section{Training Experience}\\n\\n\\\\resumeSubheading{Trainee \\u2014 Tata Consultancy Services}{}\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Completed enterprise training in Java, JavaScript, Spring Boot, Angular, JSP, and Servlets.\\n  \\\\item Built full-stack applications with backend services and MySQL database integration.\\n  \\\\item Developed CRUD-based applications simulating real-world business use cases.\\n  \\\\item Gained hands-on experience in REST API development, application architecture, and debugging.\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ SKILLS =================\\n\\\\section{Skills}\\n\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Cloud:} Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Gemini AI\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Programming:} Java, JavaScript, Python\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Frameworks:} Spring Boot, Angular\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{ML\\/AI:} TensorFlow, Keras, CNN\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Web Technologies:} JSP, Servlets\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Database:} MySQL\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Core Concepts:} Cloud Architecture, Data Pipelines, API Development, Workflow Automation, System Design\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ CERTIFICATIONS =================\\n\\\\section{Certifications}\\n\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Google Cloud Associate Cloud Engineer (ACE)\\n  \\\\item Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect (PCA)\\n  \\\\item Introduction to Internet of Things \\u2014 IIT Kharagpur (Jan 2022 -- Apr 2022)\\n  \\\\item Introduction to Industry 4.0 and Industrial Internet of Things \\u2014 IIT Kharagpur (Jul 2022 -- Oct 2022)\\n  \\\\item Design and Analysis of Algorithms \\u2014 IIT Kharagpur (Jan (8, 5, 'My Resume', '2fd266b4-dbaf-4e39-a9ba-13e32df92309', 'latex-classic', '{\"raw_latex\":\"\\\\documentclass[letterpaper,10pt]{article}\\n\\n\\\\usepackage{latexsym}\\n\\\\usepackage[empty]{fullpage}\\n\\\\usepackage{titlesec}\\n\\\\usepackage{enumitem}\\n\\\\usepackage[hidelinks]{hyperref}\\n\\\\usepackage{fancyhdr}\\n\\\\usepackage[english]{babel}\\n\\\\usepackage{tabularx}\\n\\\\usepackage{array}\\n\\\\input{glyphtounicode}\\n\\\\usepackage{fontawesome5}\\n\\\\hypersetup{colorlinks=true, urlcolor=black}\\n\\n\\\\pagestyle{fancy}\\n\\\\fancyhf{}\\n\\\\renewcommand{\\\\headrulewidth}{0pt}\\n\\\\renewcommand{\\\\footrulewidth}{0pt}\\n\\n\\\\addtolength{\\\\oddsidemargin}{-0.6in}\\n\\\\addtolength{\\\\textwidth}{1.2in}\\n\\\\addtolength{\\\\topmargin}{-0.7in}\\n\\\\addtolength{\\\\textheight}{1.4in}\\n\\n\\\\raggedright\\n\\\\raggedbottom\\n\\\\setlength{\\\\parindent}{0pt}\\n\\n\\\\titleformat{\\\\section}{\\n  \\\\vspace{-4pt}\\\\raggedright\\\\large\\\\bfseries\\\\uppercase\\n}{}{0em}{}[\\\\titlerule \\\\vspace{-4pt}]\\n\\n\\\\pdfgentounicode=1\\n\\n\\\\newcommand{\\\\resumeSubheading}[2]{\\n  \\\\begin{tabular*}{0.97\\\\textwidth}{l@{\\\\extracolsep{\\\\fill}}r}\\n    \\\\textbf{#1} & #2 \\\\\\\\\\n  \\\\end{tabular*}\\n}\\n\\n%================ EDIT DETAILS =================\\n\\\\newcommand{\\\\name}{Vanshika Singh}\\n\\\\newcommand{\\\\phone}{8076343451}\\n\\\\newcommand{\\\\email}{vanshikas117@gmail.com}\\n\\n\\\\begin{document}\\n\\n%================ HEADER =================\\n\\\\begin{tabularx}{\\\\linewidth}{X r}\\n\\\\begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}}\\n{\\\\huge \\\\textbf{Vanshika Singh}} \\\\\\\\\\n{\\\\small Bachelor Of Technology (B.Tech) - Computer Science and Engineering}\\n\\\\end{tabular}\\n&\\n\\\\begin{tabular}{@{}r@{}}\\nNoida, India \\\\\\\\\\n\\\\href{mailto:\\\\email}{\\\\email} \\\\\\\\\\n+91-\\\\phone \\\\\\\\\\n\\\\href{https:\\/\\/linkedin.com\\/in\\/vanshika-singh-162a0522a}{LinkedIn}\\n\\\\end{tabular}\\n\\\\end{tabularx}\\n\\\\vspace{-12pt}\\n\\n%================ SUMMARY =================\\n\\\\section{Professional Summary}\\n\\nCloud Engineer with practical experience in designing and deploying scalable solutions on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). Proficient in building data pipelines, integrating AI capabilities using Gemini, and developing backend services aligned with business needs. Strong understanding of cloud architecture, API development, and workflow automation with a focus on performance, scalability, and reliability.\\n\\n%================ EDUCATION =================\\n\\\\section{Education}\\n\\\\resumeSubheading\\n{Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) \\u2014 AKTU}{2020 -- 2025} \\\\\\\\\\n\\n%================ EXPERIENCE =================\\n\\\\section{Professional Experience}\\n\\n\\\\resumeSubheading{Cloud Engineer \\u2014 Tata Consultancy Services}{June 2025 -- Present}\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Working on Google Cloud ecosystem (AgentSpace, Gemini AI) to build scalable and efficient cloud-based solutions.\\n  \\\\item Translating business requirements into technical architectures and cloud workflows.\\n  \\\\item Designing and supporting data pipelines, APIs, and reporting systems.\\n  \\\\item Collaborating with stakeholders to improve system performance and operational efficiency (15--20\\\\%).\\n  \\\\item Analyzing data to generate actionable insights for business decision-making.\\n  \\\\item Contributing to automation and process optimization initiatives.\\n  \\\\item Ensuring high-quality delivery aligned with enterprise standards.\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ PROJECT =================\\n\\\\section{Project}\\n\\n\\\\resumeSubheading{Brain Tumor Detection \\\\& Classification Using Deep Learning}{Mar 2024 -- May 2024}\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Developed a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model for automated detection and classification of brain tumors from MRI images.\\n  \\\\item Implemented data preprocessing and augmentation techniques to improve dataset quality and model generalization.\\n  \\\\item Achieved over 90\\\\% classification accuracy using TensorFlow and Keras.\\n  \\\\item Optimized model performance through hyperparameter tuning and validation techniques.\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ TRAINING =================\\n\\\\section{Training Experience}\\n\\n\\\\resumeSubheading{Trainee \\u2014 Tata Consultancy Services}{}\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Completed enterprise training in Java, JavaScript, Spring Boot, Angular, JSP, and Servlets.\\n  \\\\item Built full-stack applications with backend services and MySQL database integration.\\n  \\\\item Developed CRUD-based applications simulating real-world business use cases.\\n  \\\\item Gained hands-on experience in REST API development, application architecture, and debugging.\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ SKILLS =================\\n\\\\section{Skills}\\n\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Cloud:} Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Gemini AI\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Programming:} Java, JavaScript, Python\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Frameworks:} Spring Boot, Angular\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{ML\\/AI:} TensorFlow, Keras, CNN\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Web Technologies:} JSP, Servlets\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Database:} MySQL\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Core Concepts:} Cloud Architecture, Data Pipelines, API Development, Workflow Automation, System Design\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ CERTIFICATIONS =================\\n\\\\section{Certifications}\\n\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Google Cloud Associate Cloud Engineer (ACE)\\n  \\\\item Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect (PCA)\\n  \\\\item Introduction to Internet of Things \\u2014 IIT Kharagpur (Jan 2022 -- Apr 2022)\\n  \\\\item Introduction to Industry 4.0 and Industrial Internet of Things \\u2014 IIT Kharagpur (Jul 2022 -- Oct 2022)\\n  \\\\item Design and Analysis of Algorithms \\u2014 IIT Kharagpur (Jan 2023 -- Mar 2023)\\n  \\\\item Enhancing Soft Skills and Personality \\u2014 IIT Kanpur (Feb 2022 -- Apr 2022)\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n\\\\end{document}\"}', 1, 1, '2026-05-05 18:17:46', '2026-05-05 18:17:46'),

topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Working on Google Cloud ecosystem (AgentSpace, Gemini AI) to build scalable and efficient cloud-based solutions.\\n  \\\\item Translating business requirements into technical architectures and cloud workflows.\\n  \\\\item Designing and supporting data pipelines, APIs, and reporting systems.\\n  \\\\item Collaborating with stakeholders to improve system performance and operational efficiency (15--20\\\\%).\\n  \\\\item Analyzing data to generate actionable insights for business decision-making.\\n  \\\\item Contributing to automation and process optimization initiatives.\\n  \\\\item Ensuring high-quality delivery aligned with enterprise standards.\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ PROJECT =================\\n\\\\section{Project}\\n\\n\\\\resumeSubheading{Brain Tumor Detection \\\\& Classification Using Deep Learning}{Mar 2024 -- May 2024}\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Developed a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model for automated detection and classification of brain tumors from MRI images.\\n  \\\\item Implemented data preprocessing and augmentation techniques to improve dataset quality and model generalization.\\n  \\\\item Achieved over 90\\\\% classification accuracy using TensorFlow and Keras.\\n  \\\\item Optimized model performance through hyperparameter tuning and validation techniques.\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ TRAINING =================\\n\\\\section{Training Experience}\\n\\n\\\\resumeSubheading{Trainee \\u2014 Tata Consultancy Services}{}\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Completed enterprise training in Java, JavaScript, Spring Boot, Angular, JSP, and Servlets.\\n  \\\\item Built full-stack applications with backend services and MySQL database integration.\\n  \\\\item Developed CRUD-based applications simulating real-world business use cases.\\n  \\\\item Gained hands-on experience in REST API development, application architecture, and debugging.\\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ SKILLS =================\\n\\\\section{Skills}\\n\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Cloud: Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Gemini AI \\\\item Programming: Java, JavaScript, Python \\\\item \\\\textbf{Frameworks:} Spring Boot, Angular\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{ML\\/AI:} TensorFlow, Keras, CNN\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Web Technologies:} JSP, Servlets\\n  \\\\item \\\\textbf{Database:} MySQL\\n  \\\\item Core Concepts: Cloud Architecture, Data Pipelines, API Development, Workflow Automation, System Design \\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n%================ CERTIFICATIONS =================\\n\\\\section{Certifications}\\n\\n\\\\begin{itemize}[itemsep=-1pt, topsep=0pt]\\n  \\\\item Google Cloud Associate Cloud Engineer (ACE)\\n  \\\\item Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect (PCA)\\n \\n\\\\end{itemize}\\n\\n\\\\end{document}\"}', 1, 1, '2026-05-05 19:29:16', '2026-05-05 19:29:16'),
(14, 5, 'My Resume', '2cf099b3-e6b6-45ac-bd18-33a8da6c233a', 'latex-classic', '{\"personal\":{\"name\":\"sham\",\"email\":\"sham@gmail.com\",\"phone\":\"8989878987\",\"location\":null,\"role\":null,\"summary\":null},\"education\":[{\"institution\":\"VIT Vellore\",\"degree\":null,\"year\":\"Graduating 2025\"}],\"experience\":[],\"skills\":[\"html\",\"css\",\"js\",\"react\",\"python\",\"RAG\",\"MARKETING\",\"CoppWritting\",\"C++\",\"LLM\"],\"projects\":[{\"title\":\"Test Manifest\",\"link\":null,\"description\":\"testing how proof of work will look\"}]}', 1, 1, '2026-05-05 19:42:29', '2026-05-05 19:42:29'),
(15, 5, 'My Resume', 'a5b78b29-0197-46da-9d05-d749a808a41a', 'latex-classic', '{\"personal\":{\"name\":\"sham\",\"email\":\"sham@gmail.com\",\"phone\":\"8989878987\",\"location\":null,\"role\":\"ceo\",\"summary\":\"helo this is ad\"},\"education\":[{\"institution\":\"VIT Vellore\",\"degree\":null,\"year\":\"Graduating 2025\"}],\"experience\":[],\"skills\":[\"html\",\"css\",\"js\",\"react\",\"python\",\"RAG\",\"MARKETING\",\"CoppWritting\",\"C++\",\"LLM\"],\"projects\":[{\"title\":\"Test Manifest\",\"link\":null,\"description\":\"testing how proof of works will look\"}]}', 1, 1, '2026-05-05 19:42:53', '2026-05-05 19:42:53'),
(16, 5, 'My Resume', '5ca75621-19b2-4a3f-b0a5-45add73f49df', 'latex-classic', '{\"personal\":{\"name\":\"sham\",\"email\":\"sham@gmail.com\",\"phone\":\"8989878987\",\"location\":\"Your City, India\",\"role\":\"B.Tech - Computer Science and Engineering\",\"summary\":\"Briefly describe your expertise and impact here. Focus on performance, scalability, and reliability.\"},\"education\":[{\"institution\":\"VIT Vellore\",\"degree\":\"Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech)\",\"year\":\"2020 -- 2024\"}],\"experience\":[{\"company\":\"Role \\u2014 Company Name\",\"date\":\"June 2025 -- Present\",\"points\":[\"Built scalable and efficient cloud-based solutions.\",\"Collaborated with stakeholders to improve system performance.\",\"Optimized model performance through hyperparameter tuning.\"]}],\"skills\":[\"html\",\"css\",\"js\",\"react\",\"python\",\"RAG\",\"MARKETING\",\"CoppWritting\",\"C++\",\"LLM\"],\"projects\":[{\"title\":\"Test Manifest\",\"link\":null,\"description\":\"testing how proof of work will look\"}]}', 1, 1, '2026-05-05 19:48:42', '2026-05-05 19:48:42');

-- --------------------------------------------------------

--
-- Table structure for table `reviews`
--

CREATE TABLE `reviews` (
  `id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `user_id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `professor_id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `rating` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `comment` text NOT NULL,
  `status` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `tags` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`tags`)),
  `unit_focus` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `internal_difficulty` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_flagged` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

--
-- Dumping data for table `reviews`
--

INSERT INTO `reviews` (`id`, `user_id`, `professor_id`, `rating`, `comment`, `status`, `tags`, `unit_focus`, `internal_difficulty`, `is_flagged`, `created_at`, `updated_at`) VALUES
(4, 5, 18, 5, 'he is good and if you have maintain good attendance in his class then you gonna get  good marks in your internal exams', 'pending', '[\"Strict Attendance\"]', '3', 1, 0, '2026-04-26 07:40:37', '2026-04-26 07:40:37');

-- --------------------------------------------------------

--
-- Table structure for table `rewards`
--

CREATE TABLE `rewards` (
  `id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `karma_required` int(10) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `claim_link` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `max_usage` int(10) UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `usage_count` int(10) UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `expires_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

--
-- Dumping data for table `rewards`
--

INSERT INTO `rewards` (`id`, `title`, `description`, `karma_required`, `claim_link`, `max_usage`, `usage_count`, `expires_at`, `is_active`, `created_at`, `updated_at`) VALUES
(1, 'Google Cloud GenAI Leader - Practice Exam 330 Questions 2026', 'What you\'ll learn\r\nPrepare for the Google Cloud Generative AI Leader Certification with 6 full-length mock exams (300 questions)\r\nMaster Generative AI fundamentals and Google Cloud’s AI/ML offerings like Vertex AI and Model Garden\r\nUnderstand how Google Cloud integrates AI responsibly, including governance, security, and ethics\r\nLearn key concepts in LLMs, prompt engineering, and AI lifecycle management in the cloud\r\nStrengthen real-world knowledge of generative AI use cases across industries and cloud solutions\r\nReview detailed explanations for all answers to identify and overcome weak areas effectively\r\nGain exam confidence through realistic, timed, scenario-based practice tests\r\nDevelop conceptual clarity around Responsible AI, data pipelines, and AI-powered innovation\r\nBuild readiness for future AI leadership roles in cloud-based organizations', 50, 'https://www.udemy.com/course/google-cloud-genai-leader-practice-exam-330-questions-2026-u/?couponCode=6C0CD1C6DE269727C216', 20, 1, '2026-04-17 23:18:00', 1, '2026-04-15 17:48:46', '2026-04-15 17:50:30'),
(3, 'Certified Natural Language Processing (NLP)', 'What you\'ll learn\r\nUnderstand the fundamental concepts and challenges of Natural Language Processing.\r\nMaster essential text preprocessing techniques, including tokenization, stemming, lemmatization, and stop-word removal.\r\nApply various feature engineering methods for text data, such as Bag-of-Words, TF-IDF, and N-grams.\r\nImplement and utilize different types of word embeddings like Word2Vec, GloVe, and FastText.\r\nBuild and evaluate traditional machine learning models for text classification and sentiment analysis.', 90, 'https://www.udemy.com/course/certified-natural-language-processing-nlp/?couponCode=C563BC0948C0C1B59337', 10, 0, '2026-05-31 01:16:00', 1, '2026-05-11 19:47:00', '2026-05-11 19:49:04'),
(4, 'Statistical Inference & Hypothesis Testing for Data Science', 'What you\'ll learn\r\nUnderstand core concepts of statistical inference, populations, and samples.\r\nDifferentiate between descriptive and inferential statistics effectively.\r\nFormulate null and alternative hypotheses for various data science problems.\r\nGrasp the significance of p-values and confidence intervals in decision-making.', 80, 'https://www.udemy.com/course/statistical-inference-hypothesis-testing-for-data-science/?couponCode=51B3B607E39FC274B823', 20, 0, '2026-06-10 01:18:00', 1, '2026-05-11 19:48:46', '2026-05-11 19:49:27'),
(5, 'Write Article Content for SEO and Affiliate Marketing Course', 'What you\'ll learn\r\nHow to write general article\r\nHow to write info article\r\nHow to write money article\r\nKeyword Research\r\nHow to put SEO keyword inside article', 100, 'https://www.udemy.com/course/write-article-content-for-seo-and-affiliate-marketing-course/?couponCode=25BBPMXINACTIVE', 20, 0, '2026-05-16 01:20:00', 1, '2026-05-11 19:50:41', '2026-05-11 19:50:41');

--
-- Table structure for table `users`
--

CREATE TABLE `users` (
  `id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `username` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `profile_photo_path` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `cover_photo_path` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `email` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `id_card_url` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `email_verified_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `password` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `bio` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `career_role` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_mentor` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `mentor_bio` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `mentor_topics` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`mentor_topics`)),
  `skills` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`skills`)),
  `social_links` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`social_links`)),
  `linkedin_url` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `github_url` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `instagram_url` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `role` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'student',
  `status` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `is_batch_visible` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `karma_spent` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `ban_reason` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `company_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `company_website` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `college_id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,
  `remember_token` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `integration_token` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `college_email` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `mobile` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `year` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `course_id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,
  `semester` int(11) DEFAULT NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

--
-- Dumping data for table `users`
--

INSERT INTO `users` (`id`, `name`, `username`, `profile_photo_path`, `cover_photo_path`, `email`, `id_card_url`, `email_verified_at`, `password`, `bio`, `career_role`, `is_mentor`, `mentor_bio`, `mentor_topics`, `skills`, `social_links`, `linkedin_url`, `github_url`, `instagram_url`, `role`, `status`, `is_batch_visible`, `karma_spent`, `ban_reason`, `company_name`, `company_website`, `college_id`, `remember_token`, `integration_token`, `created_at`, `updated_at`, `college_email`, `mobile`, `year`, `course_id`, `semester`) VALUES
(1, 'studycubscbs', 'studycubscbs', NULL, NULL, 'studycubs@studycubs.com', NULL, NULL, '$2y$10$cg5VbrAvtMqNem.iilzraOhq/fS.fsFN6K5ZC5NbpWI8mJpajNJSG', NULL, NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'recruiter', 'active', 0, 0, NULL, 'studycubs', 'https://www.studycubs.com', NULL, 'sAvY8ig4G604Jcvavi2WJI7iBGhJ5yeWI2k85m68cDcrYzyGMnLl7y0bJjSk', NULL, '2026-04-13 10:15:26', '2026-04-13 10:15:26', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL),

(3, 'admin', 'admin', NULL, NULL, 'admin@gmail.com', '/verifications/id_card_3_1776153772_tjz6Uzvst.jpg', NULL, '$2y$10$jWww.nZ61AjgHrwBFR7gjeUincfEBciwWSoDbN.2PKXlnVnfvrrUW', NULL, NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'admin', 'active', 0, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'HbOq92teH0vCS5sTXXDnNN8jBwyl7itssMjb0eTMBXmuP7rMV9MSbrV9wHcS', NULL, '2026-04-13 10:42:13', '2026-04-14 08:02:53', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL),

-- --------------------------------------------------------

--
-- Table structure for table `user_educations`
--

CREATE TABLE `user_educations` (
  `id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `user_id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `institution` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `degree` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `field_of_study` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `year` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- --------------------------------------------------------

--
-- Table structure for table `user_experiences`
--

CREATE TABLE `user_experiences` (
  `id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `user_id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `company` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `type` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Internship',
  `duration` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
